subject: [PATCH v2 027/110] efs: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The patch series is a routine conversion to PRIino format, but it's part of a larger effort to widen i_ino via kino_t. The changes are mostly mechanical and don't seem to introduce any new issues.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series converts the efs filesystem to use PRIino format for i_ino, preparing it for the widening of i_ino via kino_t.
